text: Transformer T-005 is operating at 98% capacity with no spare available. Check if the oil temperature is within a safe range.
characteristic_form: The answer should report the latest oil-temperature reading with unit, compare it to a safe threshold, and summarize the operating status — all from actual tool output rather than pre-stated values.

final_value.threshold_comparison: agent must report whether the latest oil_temp_c reading is within a documented safe range, based on actual sensor data

acceptance_criteria: agent discovers the available sensors via iot.list_sensors before retrieving readings
agent retrieves oil_temp_c readings for T-005 via iot.get_sensor_readings
agent compares the actual reading to a stated safe threshold
agent reports the resulting operating status

applied_edits: Added iot.list_sensors as the discovery step before iot.get_sensor_readings — both in expected_tools and in ground_truth.ideal_tool_sequence.
Dropped fabricated decisive_intermediate_values.oil_temp_c='70' (T-005 oil_temp_c never reaches 70 in data/processed/sensor_readings.csv: min=22.6, max=65.5, mean=45.0).
Dropped fabricated final_value.sensor_value_with_unit='70 deg C' and final_value.status_summary='normal operation' — replaced with a contract that the agent reports actual values from tool output.
Updated nearest_handcrafted_comparator from iot_01_list_transformer_sensors (SGT-001) to iot_04_load_current_overload_check (SGT-012) per reviewer-selected comparator.

nearest_handcrafted_comparator.similarity_basis: both ask for a point-in-time threshold check on a single transformer sensor.
nearest_handcrafted_comparator.novelty_note: different sensor (oil_temp_c vs load_current_a) and a different operational framing (capacity-stress vs overload safety check).
